en: Refresh the production desktop build from the latest main branch
Supersede the 1.8.53 rollout with updated production release metadata
zh: 基于最新 main 分支刷新生产桌面端构建
使用新的生产发布元数据替代 1.8.53 rollout

en: Refresh the production desktop build from the latest main branch
Update release delivery metadata for macOS, Windows, and Linux installers
zh: 基于最新 main 分支刷新生产桌面端构建
更新 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 安装包的发布分发元数据

en: Add affiliate outreach channel UI and desktop bridge support
Introduce affiliate checkpoint sessions, relationship history tools, and workspace refinements
Improve customer-service inbox search, channel aliases, subscription auth recovery, and TikTok Ads management
zh: 新增达人触达渠道 UI 和桌面端 bridge 支持
引入达人 checkpoint sessions、关系历史工具，并优化工作区体验
优化客服 inbox 搜索、渠道别名、订阅鉴权恢复和 TikTok Ads 管理

en: Improve the customer-service chat session sidebar and conversation status typing
Clarify affiliate send-message prompts for more reliable outreach
Polish affiliate ID copy interactions in seller workflows
zh: 优化客服聊天会话侧边栏和会话状态类型
明确达人消息发送 prompt，提升触达流程稳定性
优化卖家流程中的达人 ID 复制交互

en: Sync desktop ToolSpecs subscriptions so cloud tool runtime stays current
Fix emoji-only customer-service replies and simplify image handling for forwarded messages
Improve affiliate creator avatar rendering and add ads sync health status
zh: 同步桌面端 ToolSpecs 订阅，确保云端工具运行时保持最新
修复客服纯 emoji 回复，并简化转发消息的图片处理路径
优化达人头像渲染，并新增广告同步健康状态

en: Reduce customer-service session churn and require pending dispatch replies before forwarding
Recover backend subscriptions after invalid JWT responses so desktop update and realtime channels stay connected
Clean up duplicate chat image bubbles and OAuth token expiry display
zh: 降低客服会话抖动，并要求待派发回复就绪后再转发
在 JWT 失效后自动恢复后端订阅，确保桌面更新和实时通道保持连接
修复聊天图片重复气泡和 OAuth token 过期时间展示问题

en: Record Feishu inbound message recipients per account so channel routing stays accurate
Refine affiliate proposal placement and supporting localized panel copy
zh: 按账号记录飞书入站消息接收人，确保渠道路由更准确
优化达人提案展示位置，并补齐相关面板多语言文案

en: Restore Feishu official plugin loading so desktop chat channels can start reliably
Hydrate the active Feishu plugin config on startup and prune stale bundled OpenClaw plugin paths
zh: 恢复飞书官方插件加载，确保桌面端客服渠道可以稳定启动
在启动时补齐当前飞书插件配置，并清理过时的内置 OpenClaw 插件路径

en: Restore macOS runtime dependency packaging so the desktop app can launch after updating
Fix the macOS 1.8.44 startup crash caused by missing bundled Node modules
zh: 恢复 macOS 运行时依赖打包，确保桌面端更新后可以正常启动
修复 macOS 1.8.44 因缺少内置 Node 模块导致的启动崩溃

en: Add Feishu QR onboarding and improve channel form boolean selections and allowlist handling
Fix stale model authentication in channel sessions and WeChat send-health display
Refine affiliate creator workflows, content follow-up work items, boundaries, and proposal history cards
zh: 新增飞书扫码 onboarding，并优化渠道表单布尔选择和 allowlist 处理
修复渠道会话中的旧模型认证问题，并修复微信发送健康状态展示
优化达人 creator workflow、内容跟进 work item、边界展示和提案历史卡片

en: Show WeChat activation and runtime status more clearly in customer-service channel views
Support affiliate creator thread work items and align affiliate UI with shop creator threads
Show creator identity fallbacks in affiliate proposals
zh: 在客服渠道视图中更清晰展示微信激活和运行状态
支持达人 creator thread work item，并让达人界面与店铺 creator thread 对齐
在达人提案中展示创作者身份兜底信息

en: Refine customer-service realtime escalation handling and value chart wording
Surface WeChat channel health state while removing an unauthorized vendor patch
Apply customer-service session models lazily during dispatch
zh: 优化客服实时升级处理和价值图表文案
展示微信渠道健康状态，并移除未授权的 vendor patch
在派发时懒加载客服会话模型

en: Add the customer-service performance dashboard with localized panel copy and navigation
Support affiliate proposal revision requests and refine affiliate session handling
Fix cloud LLM billing sync session resets and polish customer-service billing status layout
zh: 新增客服绩效看板，并补齐面板多语言文案和导航
支持达人提案修改请求，并优化达人会话处理
修复云端 LLM 计费同步的会话重置问题，并打磨客服计费状态布局

en: Stabilize affiliate management workspaces, bundled work items, proposal updates, and actionable temporal deltas
Add global cloud quota banners, backfill panel i18n keys, and improve billing/shop grouping surfaces
Harden WeChat channel unhealthy-state handling, customer-service escalation warnings, and unpaid reachout shop settings
zh: 稳定达人管理工作区、组合 work item、提案更新和可操作时间线变化展示
新增全局云端额度横幅，补齐面板多语言键，并优化计费和店铺分组界面
加固微信渠道异常状态处理、客服升级提醒和未付款触达店铺设置

en: Limit customer-service session context tokens and refresh the OpenClaw session-context patch coverage
Update affiliate proposal decision fields across desktop, panel, subscriptions, and generated GraphQL types
zh: 限制客服会话上下文 token，并刷新 OpenClaw 会话上下文补丁覆盖
更新达人提案决策字段，覆盖桌面端、面板、订阅和生成的 GraphQL 类型

en: Add affiliate creator management and approval policy management UI
Add deterministic unpaid order reminder settings with template placeholders and localized placeholder chips
Refine affiliate prediction judgment labels, unpaid reachout settings UI, and shop workspace modal sizing
zh: 新增达人管理和达人审批策略管理界面
新增确定性的未付款订单提醒设置，支持模板占位符和本地化占位符标签
优化达人预测判断标签、未付款触达设置界面和店铺工作区弹窗尺寸

en: Keep customer-service close-out instructions backend-owned and route close-out dispatches through the end-session tool
Improve affiliate product-fit workflows and sample/product context resolution
Add BI tool internationalization labels for clearer desktop tool presentation
zh: 将客服结束会话指令保持在后端统一管理，并通过结束会话工具派发 close-out
优化达人商品匹配流程，以及样品和商品上下文解析
补充 BI 工具多语言标签，让桌面端工具展示更清晰

en: Harden customer-service session refresh, delayed close-out dispatch, duplicate snapshot aborts, and error handling
Refine affiliate desktop work-item flows with clearer boundaries, acknowledgement handling, and send-message resilience
Reduce customer-service dispatch token churn and refresh generated GraphQL types
zh: 加固客服会话刷新、延迟结束派发、重复快照中止和错误处理
优化达人桌面 work item 流程，明确边界、确认处理，并提升发消息稳定性
降低客服派发 token 消耗，并刷新生成的 GraphQL 类型

en: Add clearer affiliate model recommendation guidance for seller decision support
Fix unpaid reachout settings and clarify unpaid reachout dispatch context
Polish customer-service close-out rating prompts and affiliate work republish locale handling
zh: 增加更清晰的达人模型推荐引导，辅助卖家决策
修复未付款触达设置，并明确未付款触达派发上下文
打磨客服结束会话评分提示，并修复达人 work 重新发布的多语言处理

en: Add affiliate ML insights and refine expected-sales intelligence across desktop and panel flows
Improve affiliate proposal context, supporting metrics, lifecycle types, and required-action dispatch
Polish customer-service controls, billing actions, auth bootstrap, and Windows native rebuild CI diagnostics
zh: 新增达人合作 ML 洞察，并优化桌面端和面板里的预期销量智能分析流程
改进达人合作提案上下文、支撑指标、生命周期类型和必需动作派发
打磨客服控制、计费操作、认证启动流程，并增强 Windows 原生重建 CI 诊断

en: Wire desktop admin device controls and remove the debug channel subscription
Fix desktop subscription authentication lifecycle handling so live updates recover cleanly
Stabilize deterministic captcha login flows and refresh generated GraphQL admin types
zh: 接入桌面端 admin 设备控制，并移除调试频道订阅
修复桌面端订阅认证生命周期处理，让实时更新能稳定恢复
稳定确定性验证码登录流程，并刷新生成的 GraphQL admin 类型

en: Tie desktop backend subscriptions to the authentication lifecycle so reconnects recover cleanly
Patch OpenClaw media tool model overrides for more reliable media handling
Add customer-service evidence request guardrails and expose escalation dismissal to agents
zh: 将桌面端后台订阅绑定到认证生命周期，让重连恢复更稳定
修补 OpenClaw 媒体工具模型覆盖逻辑，提升媒体处理可靠性
增加客服证据请求防护，并向 agent 暴露升级单关闭能力

en: Recover long-lived backend subscriptions after complete events so desktop sessions keep receiving updates
Refine ecommerce authentication bootstrap and panel navigation for smoother startup handoff
zh: 在 complete 事件后恢复长连接后台订阅，确保桌面会话持续接收更新
优化电商认证启动引导和面板导航，让启动交接更顺畅

en: Stabilize customer-service shop lifecycle handling for the CS relay
Keep customer-service shop context intact across subscription reconnects
Route remote media through the cached proxy so media attachments load more reliably
zh: 稳定客服 relay 的店铺生命周期处理
在订阅重连后保持客服店铺上下文不丢失
让远端媒体通过缓存代理转发，提高媒体附件加载可靠性

en: Fix RivonClaw cloud model vision inputs so image-aware requests are routed with the expected payload shape
Keep desktop cloud-model calls aligned with the latest vision-capable RivonClaw API contract
Refresh signed desktop release metadata for the production updater rollout
zh: 修复 RivonClaw 云模型 vision input，确保带图片请求使用符合预期的 payload 结构
让桌面端云模型调用匹配最新支持视觉能力的 RivonClaw API 契约
刷新签名桌面发布元数据，用于 production updater 推送

en: Harden customer-service pending dispatch recovery by anchoring retries to explicit message IDs
Fix startup cloud model synchronization and keep desktop sessions fully isolated between runs
Refresh customer-service session state handling and guide Telegram debug media sends more clearly
zh: 加固客服 pending dispatch 恢复流程，使用明确的 message ID 锚定重试
修复启动时云模型同步竞态，并让桌面会话在不同运行之间保持完全隔离
刷新客服会话状态处理，并更清晰地引导 Telegram debug 媒体发送

en: Treat null shop-update fields as no-ops so existing ecommerce shop details are not cleared accidentally
Keep the ecommerce panel aligned with the updated shop-update contract when backend payloads omit optional values
Relax customer-service platform catchup eligibility so recovery can proceed in more valid conversation states
zh: 将店铺更新中的 null 字段视为无操作，避免意外清空已有电商店铺信息
让电商面板匹配新的店铺更新契约，后端省略可选值时不覆盖现有状态
放宽客服平台 catchup eligibility，让更多有效会话状态可以继续恢复

en: Refine the desktop welcome flow and authentication entry points so new sellers land in the right setup path faster
Localize ecommerce regions and chat example presets across supported panel languages
Improve China dependency provisioning and harden customer-service escalation and reply-format handling
zh: 优化桌面端欢迎流程与登录入口，让新卖家更快进入正确的初始化路径
本地化电商区域与聊天示例预设，覆盖面板支持的多语言
改进中国网络下的依赖供给，并加固客服升级通知与回复格式处理

en: Return completed OAuth shop payloads so the desktop app can refresh connected shop state immediately
Handle multi-shop OAuth event bursts more reliably when several shops finish authorization together
Fix customer-service dispatch RPC timeout handling so retry and recovery paths stay aligned
zh: OAuth 完成后返回店铺 payload，让桌面端可以立即刷新已连接店铺状态
增强多店铺 OAuth 事件突发处理，多个店铺同时完成授权时更稳定
修复客服分派 RPC 超时处理，让重试与恢复路径保持一致

en: Add desktop announcements and invite-code UI so users can see product notices and account access details in the app
Improve the new-user ecommerce setup path with default client updates, preset shop skills, and refreshed chat examples
Fix customer-service Airflow retry dispatch recovery, keep Telegram debug polling enabled, and refresh desktop E2E coverage
zh: 新增桌面端公告与邀请码界面，用户可以在应用内查看产品通知和账号访问状态
优化新用户电商初始化路径，补齐默认客户端更新、店铺预设技能和聊天示例
修复客服 Airflow 重试分派恢复，保持 Telegram debug 轮询开启，并刷新桌面端 E2E 覆盖

en: Improve customer-service Airflow retry handling by using backend dispatch time for more accurate retry windows
Keep customer-service session retry snapshots aligned with backend timing so repeated attempts are less likely to drift
Clarify MAX plan usage copy across the desktop panel
zh: 优化客服 Airflow 重试处理，使用后端分派时间计算更准确的重试窗口
让客服会话重试快照与后端时间保持一致，减少重复尝试时的时间偏移
更新桌面面板中的 MAX 套餐使用说明文案

en: Add server-driven desktop log upload so support can request current logs from signed-in clients when troubleshooting
Expand panel tutorial coverage across billing, ecommerce, customer service, affiliate, and settings workflows
Refresh the desktop app description around RivonClaw as the AI Shop Manager for sellers
zh: 新增由服务端触发的桌面端日志上传能力，便于支持排查时请求已登录客户端上传当前日志
扩展面板教程覆盖范围，补齐账单、电商、客服、达人协作和设置流程引导
更新桌面端应用描述，将 RivonClaw 定位为面向卖家的 AI Shop Manager

en: Improve macOS updater efficiency by packaging the OpenClaw runtime as a blockmap-friendly tar archive
Harden agent tooling startup so cloud tools and customer-service bridges wait for the gateway catalog to be ready
Keep CI checks aligned with the new macOS runtime archive contract
zh: 优化 macOS 更新效率，将 OpenClaw runtime 打包为更适合 blockmap 复用的 tar 归档
加固 Agent 工具启动流程，让云端工具与客服桥接等待 gateway 工具目录就绪后再启动
同步更新 CI 校验，匹配新的 macOS runtime 归档契约

en: Improve first-party domain routing so desktop clients test the real RivonClaw API path before switching to the China relay
Harden proxy-aware network handling with better redirect, loopback, and first-party domain coverage
Keep release and update traffic on the correct global or relay endpoint based on runtime connectivity
zh: 优化首方域名路由，桌面端会先验证真实 RivonClaw API 路径再切换到中国 relay
加固代理网络处理，补强重定向、本地回环地址和首方域名覆盖
根据运行时连通性保持发布与更新流量走正确的全球或 relay 端点

en: Refresh signed desktop release metadata for end-to-end electron-updater validation on macOS and Windows
Keep the packaged OpenClaw runtime contract checks in CI so update artifacts include required workspace templates
Use this staging build to confirm signed installer updates complete cleanly across supported desktop platforms
zh: 刷新已签名桌面端发布元数据，用于在 macOS 与 Windows 上端到端验证 electron-updater
继续在 CI 中校验打包后的 OpenClaw runtime 契约，确保更新产物包含必需的工作区模板
使用这次 staging 构建确认签名安装包更新能在支持的桌面平台上顺利完成

en: Enable macOS Developer ID signing and notarization in CI so downloads install cleanly without Gatekeeper workarounds
Restore the signed macOS auto-update flow now that release artifacts can be trusted by electron-updater
Prepare Windows release signing through Azure Artifact Signing with CI signature verification
zh: 启用 macOS Developer ID 签名与公证的 CI 流程，下载后的安装体验不再依赖 Gatekeeper 绕行
恢复已签名 macOS 构建的自动更新流程，让 electron-updater 可以正常接管下载与安装
接入 Windows Azure Artifact Signing 发布签名准备，并在 CI 中校验签名结果

en: Add affiliate prediction review and campaign threshold controls so creator collaboration decisions are easier to inspect and tune
Improve affiliate task execution with clearer proposal IDs, safer acknowledgement guards, and more accurate prediction snapshots
Polish customer-service and shop subscription handling with stronger session revalidation and clearer free/expiry labels
zh: 新增达人预测审核与活动阈值控制，达人合作决策现在更容易检查和调整
优化达人任务执行链路，补强提案 ID、确认保护和预测快照准确性
继续打磨客服与店铺订阅体验，增强会话复核，并让免费服务与到期状态展示更清楚

en: Add billing renewal and plan-switch flows so subscriptions and prepaid MAX plans can be renewed more flexibly in the desktop app
Improve account and provider management with clearer renewal UI, smoother desktop OAuth recovery, and more reliable cloud key syncing
Harden customer-service and Windows runtime behavior with safer retry snapshots, better billing state handling, and a fix for plugin skill linking on Windows
zh: 新增订阅续费与套餐切换流程，桌面端现在可以更灵活地处理订阅和预付费 MAX 套餐续费
优化账号与服务商管理，补强续费界面、桌面端 OAuth 恢复流程，以及云端密钥同步稳定性
继续加固客服与 Windows 运行稳定性，修复重试快照、账单状态处理，以及 Windows 插件技能链接问题

en: Let customer-service agents explicitly end sessions so conversations close cleanly when work is finished
Improve escalation and dispatch handling with clearer conversation snapshots, safer hint routing, and more reliable session state updates
Polish the customer-service workspace with better escalation actions and stronger shop query coverage
zh: 支持客服 AI 主动结束会话，任务处理完后能更干净地收尾
优化升级单与分派链路，补强会话快照、提示路由和会话状态更新的可靠性
继续打磨客服工作台，改进升级单操作体验并补全店铺查询覆盖

en: Add a customer service workspace for tracking escalations and conversation state directly in the desktop app
Improve ecommerce and affiliate workflows with fresher conversation snapshots, stronger work context, and TikTok Shop market labels
Simplify the app by removing legacy browser profile and file permission features, while improving chat model defaults and context budget display
zh: 新增客服工作台，可在桌面端集中查看升级工单与会话状态
优化电商与达人协作流程，补强会话快照、任务上下文，以及 TikTok Shop 市场标签
精简旧版浏览器资料与文件权限功能，同时改进聊天默认模型切换和上下文预算显示

en: Add affiliate management and proposal review workflows so creator collaboration tasks can be handled more directly in the desktop app
Improve cloud and customer-service stability with better auth recovery, device assignment checks, and safer restart/config behavior
Polish desktop chat behavior with persistent custom tab titles and more reliable default provider session reset handling
zh: 新增达人合作管理与提案审核能力，达人协作任务现在可以直接在桌面端处理
增强云端与客服流程稳定性，改进认证恢复、设备指派校验，以及重启/配置切换时的可靠性
优化桌面端聊天体验，自定义标签名可保留，默认模型会话切换也更稳定

en: Add cloud customer service and ecommerce relay flows to support online service handoff, signal routing, and creator-commerce workflows
Improve desktop stability by centralizing OpenClaw config writes and explicitly materializing RivonClaw plugin tools
Fix multiple chat and account sync issues, including WeChat account state/recipient handling and codex model catalog updates
zh: 补上云端客服与电商 relay 流程，支持线上客服接管、信号转发和达人电商协作链路
加强桌面端稳定性，统一 OpenClaw 配置写入流程，并补齐 RivonClaw 插件工具加载
修复多项聊天与账号同步问题，包括微信账号状态、消息接收方识别，以及 Codex 模型列表更新

en: Add affiliate inbound and ecommerce relay foundations to support upcoming creator collaboration and ecommerce automation workflows
Bundle local CLI launch support into the Windows installer and improve startup/runtime dependency staging for a smoother desktop setup
Improve chat polish by hiding internal exec completion noise and making preset skill package downloads/extraction work more reliably
zh: 补上联盟达人与电商 relay 的底层能力，为后续达人合作、电商自动化等功能打基础
Windows 安装包整合本地 CLI 启动支持，并改进运行依赖准备流程，桌面端安装和启动更顺手
优化聊天体验，隐藏内部执行完成提示噪音，同时让预置技能包下载与解压更稳定

en: Add inventory and warehouse management to the ecommerce workspace so stock, warehouses, and WMS data are easier to manage in one place
Improve ecommerce tool labels and translations for a clearer desktop experience
Stabilize desktop behavior with better default chat-model handling and fewer tab refresh glitches
zh: 电商工作台新增库存与仓库管理，商品库存、仓库和 WMS 信息可以更集中地处理
补全并优化电商工具文案与翻译，桌面端操作更清晰
改进桌面端默认模型处理与标签页刷新稳定性，减少使用中的小异常

en: Improve customer-service delivery recovery so sensitive replies are resent more reliably after interruptions
Migrate legacy mobile channel settings automatically during upgrade to keep existing mobile connections working
Include shop aliases consistently in desktop cloud queries for a more complete ecommerce management view
zh: 增强客服消息恢复能力，敏感回复在中断后的重新投递更稳定
升级时自动迁移旧版手机频道配置，已有移动端连接更不容易失效
桌面端云端查询补全店铺别名信息，电商管理视图更完整

en: Improve ecommerce setup with direct shop alias editing and a cleaner, more stable shop table layout
Fix webchat keepalive timing so chat connections wait for the sidecar to be ready before reconnecting
zh: 优化电商店铺管理：支持直接编辑店铺别名，列表布局也更清晰稳定
修复网页聊天连接保活时机，等待 sidecar 就绪后再重连，减少连接异常

en: Add ecommerce profile system-tool support so store workflows can access the right built-in capabilities more reliably
Improve chat session and tool selection behavior for a smoother desktop conversation experience
Reduce unnecessary gateway restarts by refreshing tool capabilities only when auth changes
zh: 补全电商配置下的系统工具能力，店铺相关流程现在更完整也更稳定
优化聊天会话与工具选择体验，桌面端对话操作更顺手
减少不必要的网关重启，只有认证变化时才刷新工具能力

en: Fix desktop ecommerce auth bootstrap so sign-in and shop connection initialize more reliably
Improve customer-service bridge error details so failures are easier to understand and troubleshoot
Simplify tool error display in chat so error messages are cleaner and less noisy
zh: 修复桌面端电商认证初始化问题，登录和店铺连接流程更稳定
增强客服桥接报错信息，失败原因更清楚，也更容易排查
优化对话里的工具报错展示，错误提示更简洁不打扰

en: Improve desktop sign-in and startup reliability by separating auth state from bootstrap and fixing desktop bootstrap query fields
Fix cron run profile selector persistence so scheduled task settings save more reliably
zh: 提升桌面端登录和启动稳定性：拆分认证状态与启动初始化流程，并修复桌面 bootstrap 查询字段
修复定时任务运行配置选择器的保存问题，计划任务设置更稳定

en: Improve desktop sign-in and bootstrap reliability by separating auth state from desktop bootstrap and fixing surface bootstrap query fields
Fix cron run profile selector persistence so scheduled task configuration is saved more reliably
Fix desktop updater payload typing to reduce update-flow edge-case errors
zh: 改进桌面端登录与初始化稳定性：拆分认证状态和启动初始化流程，并修复 surface bootstrap 查询字段
修复定时任务运行配置选择器的保存问题，计划任务设置更稳定
修复桌面端更新数据类型处理，减少更新流程里的边缘报错

en: Fix customer-service replies leaking internal tool text and correct the related order query shape
Show local chat titles immediately for a snappier chat session experience
zh: 修复客服回复中偶发混入内部工具文本的问题，并修正相关订单查询结构
本地聊天标题现在会更快显示，对话列表反馈更及时

en: Fix production update download links so desktop clients can fetch installers from the correct release URLs
Improve ecommerce shop setup with smarter default selections and a cleaner market configuration flow
zh: 修复生产环境更新下载链接，客户端现在能从正确的发布地址获取安装包
优化电商店铺配置默认选项，开店与市场配置流程更顺手

en: Improve Feishu channel migration so bot names carry over correctly after upgrade
Refine customer-service usage tracking with cache-token reporting in token snapshots
zh: 完善飞书渠道升级迁移，升级后 bot 名称继承更准确
补全客服用量统计，token snapshot 现在会记录 cache token

en: Improve channel stability with cleaner WeChat account syncing, fewer ghost accounts, and more reliable QR login flows
Add provider usage details and re-auth flows so subscription status and key usage are easier to understand
Upgrade customer-service reliability with background image compression, richer usage tracking, and stronger delivery error reporting
Harden startup and install behavior across platforms, including safer plugin initialization and cross-platform postinstall handling
zh: 提升渠道稳定性：微信账号同步更干净，减少幽灵账号，扫码登录流程更可靠
服务商页面新增用量明细和重新认证流程，订阅状态与密钥使用情况更清楚
增强客服链路稳定性：图片压缩移到后台处理，补全用量统计，并加强投递失败诊断
加固多平台启动和安装流程，包括更稳的插件初始化与跨平台安装处理

en: Fix plugin deny-list cleanup so removed plugin IDs do not remain in generated config
Improve telemetry identity handling so user IDs update and reset correctly during runtime changes
zh: 修复插件禁用列表清理问题：已移除的插件 ID 不会再残留在生成配置里
改进遥测身份切换逻辑，运行时用户 ID 的更新与重置更准确

en: Improve app update reliability by moving update checks to the backend as the single source of truth
Fix Windows upgrades leaving behind stale runtime files that could break startup after updating
Shorten chat session retention to keep recent conversations cleaner and reduce stale history buildup
Polish the cron job editor layout for a cleaner and easier scheduling experience
zh: 统一应用更新流程，由后端作为唯一可信来源，提升更新检查与升级稳定性
修复 Windows 升级后残留旧运行时文件、导致更新后启动异常的问题
缩短聊天会话保留时间，减少陈旧历史堆积，让最近会话更清爽
优化定时任务编辑界面布局，创建和调整计划任务更顺手

en: Fix chat images disappearing after page switches and preserve provider errors when switching tabs or reloading history
Improve startup and external-channel reliability with stronger RPC connection handling, timeout guarantees, and better recovery from stale states
Fix browser and cloud networking behind system proxies, including browser relay SSRF guard bypass when proxy env vars are set
Improve macOS auto-update and packaging by fully switching to separate Apple Silicon and Intel update feeds
Upgrade the bundled OpenClaw engine and harden desktop build, release, and test pipelines
zh: 修复聊天图片在切页后消失的问题，并保留切换标签页或重载历史后的服务商报错提示
增强启动与外部频道运行稳定性：改进 RPC 连接、超时兜底和陈旧状态恢复
修复系统代理场景下的浏览器与云端网络问题，包括开启代理环境变量时放行浏览器中继请求
完善 macOS 自动更新与打包流程，全面切换为 Apple Silicon / Intel 分离更新通道
升级内置 OpenClaw 引擎，并加固桌面端构建、发布和测试链路

en: Add one-click log upload from Settings → Data Directory to make troubleshooting much easier
Improve proxy compatibility so telemetry, speech-to-text, updater, and other cloud features work more reliably behind system proxies
Improve customer service sessions with recent-order context, stale-session cleanup, and a clearer runtime status banner
Improve channel and account stability, including managed provider cleanup and WeChat channel updates
Refactor major desktop and panel screens to a cleaner architecture for better long-term reliability
zh: 设置页的数据目录卡片新增一键上传日志，排查问题更省事
增强代理网络兼容性：遥测、语音转文字、自动更新等云端功能在系统代理下更稳定
优化客服会话体验：补充最近订单上下文、清理陈旧会话，并提供更清晰的运行状态提示
提升渠道与账号稳定性，包括清理失效 provider 配置并更新微信渠道能力
重构桌面端和面板的大量页面结构，为后续版本的稳定性打基础

en: Fix startup freezes and long launch delays, especially on machines with Ollama or browser-control related slowdown
Improve proxy-aware networking so cloud features follow system proxy more reliably, including retries and image-capability sync
Improve customer service and ecommerce flows, including better session startup, order backfill, and takeover state handling
Improve chat stability with better timeout errors, restored session trackers on tab switch, and hidden heartbeat prompts
Split macOS builds into separate arm64 and x64 installers
Add a Refresh Tools button on the account page
zh: 修复启动卡顿和长时间转圈，尤其是装了 Ollama 或受浏览器控制模块影响时的启动变慢问题
增强代理网络兼容性，云端功能更稳定跟随系统代理，并补上重试与图片能力同步
优化客服与电商流程，包括会话启动、订单号回填和接管状态处理
提升聊天稳定性：超时错误更明确，切换标签页后能正确恢复会话状态，并隐藏心跳提示
将 macOS 构建拆分为独立的 arm64 和 x64 安装包
账户页新增“刷新工具”按钮

en: Add customer service system with many-to-many escalation, behavior guidelines, per-turn delivery, and session lifecycle
Add ecommerce management page with shop table, billing, and service credits
Dynamic port allocation for all local services — no more port conflicts
Smart model switch: only reset active sessions when changing global default
Add global toast notifications for all operations
Add generic cloud REST proxy with centralized API routing
Fix exec tool approval dialog appearing when ask mode is off
Fix OAuth subscription reconnection loop and auth error handling
Fix modal accidentally closing when dragging from content to backdrop
zh: 新增完整客服系统，支持多对多升级转接、行为准则、逐条消息投递和会话生命周期
新增电商管理页面，包含店铺列表、账单和服务积分
所有本地服务动态端口分配，彻底告别端口冲突
智能模型切换：更改全局默认模型时只重置活跃会话
新增全局操作反馈通知
新增通用云端 REST 代理，统一 API 路由
修复关闭 ask 模式后仍弹出执行工具审批对话框
修复 OAuth 订阅重连循环及认证错误
修复从弹窗内容区拖拽到背景时意外关闭的问题

en: Fix duplicate messages in webchat channel event bridge
Fix local run completion not clearing pending state
Reorganize merchant extensions into separate private repo
Improve vendor dependency layout and build script reliability
zh: 修复网页聊天频道收到重复消息的问题
修复本地运行完成后状态未正确清除的问题
商户扩展插件迁移至独立私有仓库
优化依赖布局和构建脚本可靠性

en: Add WeChat channel integration with QR code login
Add TikTok Shop customer service tools (21 MCP tools)
Real-time update push notification via server subscription
Allow editing display name for QR-login channel accounts
Auto-set WeChat account display name on login
Centralize hardcoded URLs and domains into shared config
Fix chat page getting stuck when final event is missing
Fix panel theme not syncing to provisioner window
Fix streaming defaults and Telegram streaming normalization

新增 TikTok Shop 客服工具（21 个 MCP 工具）
新版本推送改为服务端实时通知
支持编辑扫码登录渠道的显示名称
微信账号登录后自动设置显示名称
统一管理内部链接和域名配置
修复对话页面偶尔卡住的问题
修复设置窗口主题不同步的问题
修复流式响应默认配置和 Telegram 流式规范化

en: Fix provider key cleanup on logout and serialize cloud key sync
Reload provider keys after logout to prevent stale state
zh: 修复登出后模型服务密钥未清理的问题
修复登出后密钥状态残留导致的异常

en: Fix provider key loading for non-logged-in users
zh: 修复未登录用户无法加载模型服务密钥的问题

en: Auto-provision RivonClaw AI provider for Pro Plan users
Upgrade OpenClaw engine to v2026.3.13-1
Restore skill page features (install, update, delete, refresh) lost during UI migration
Fix startup delay: preload plugin-sdk to avoid 60s jiti babel transform
Fix vendor build: plugin-sdk bundle and CI packaging
zh: Pro Plan 用户自动配置 RivonClaw AI 模型服务
升级 OpenClaw 引擎至 v2026.3.13-1
修复界面迁移后技能页面缺失的安装、更新、删除、刷新功能
修复启动延迟：预加载插件 SDK 避免 60 秒编译等待
修复构建流程：插件 SDK 打包及 CI 构建问题

en: UI overhaul: component refactor, theme separation, and redesigned skills page
Restore skill page features lost during UI migration (install, update, delete, refresh)
Add captcha-based authentication and centralized default settings
Add channel group-allow-from editor with SQLite-backed account config
Plugin SDK refactor with internationalized branding
Add system theme support and settings button to dependency provisioner
Fix dependency provisioner showing misleading 'Setup complete' on failure
Fix locally-installed skills missing display name falling back to folder name
Fix rebrand migration incorrectly deleting old data directory
Fix plugin SDK register() broken this binding
zh: 界面全面改版：组件重构、主题分离、技能页面重新设计
修复界面迁移后技能页面缺失的安装、更新、删除、刷新功能
新增验证码登录认证和集中式默认配置

依赖安装器支持跟随系统主题，新增设置按钮
修复依赖安装失败时仍显示「安装完成」的误导提示
修复本地安装的技能缺少名称时显示为空
修复品牌迁移时误删旧数据目录
修复插件 SDK register() 方法 this 绑定错误

en: Fix rebrand migration missing agents and skills directories
Fix garbled dependency installer output on Windows Chinese locale
Fix chat session tabs not refreshing after sending a message
Fix Codex OAuth helper missing in production builds
Add page-jump pagination to skill marketplace
Fix stale plugin ID replacement during gateway config migration

修复 Windows 中文系统下依赖安装器显示乱码
修复发送消息后会话标签页未刷新
修复生产构建中缺少 Codex OAuth 组件
技能市场新增页码跳转分页
修复网关配置迁移时旧插件 ID 未正确替换

en: Rebrand to RivonClaw with automatic data migration from EasyClaw
First-launch system dependencies provisioner with China mirror support
Hybrid OAuth flow for Gemini and OpenAI Codex subscriptions
Display tool call arguments in collapsible chat panels
Unified prompt injection and tool registry with browser profiles extension

New app icons across all platforms
Numerous CI, packaging, and stability fixes

首次启动自动安装系统依赖，支持国内镜像加速

聊天中可展开查看工具调用参数
统一提示词注入和工具注册系统，新增浏览器配置扩展
重新设计「更多功能」页面布局，优化多语言支持
全平台新图标
大量 CI、打包和稳定性修复

en: Harden Windows vendor dependency packaging and startup path
Adjust desktop window size and refine skills marketplace layout

调整桌面窗口尺寸，优化技能市场界面布局
增强移动聊天消息发送重试机制
修复 Windows CI 构建冷启动超时问题

en: Fix vendor runtime dependency packaging for extensions
Fix mobile chat channel media send errors
Fix Feishu SDK packaging in desktop builds
Refine provider fallback model handling and refresh model defaults
Stabilize desktop e2e test selectors

修复移动聊天频道发送媒体文件失败的问题
修复飞书 SDK 未正确打包的问题
优化模型回退逻辑和默认模型配置
提升桌面端自动化测试稳定性

en: Fix proxy configuration not applying correctly to all network requests
Fix OAuth token acquisition failing in packaged builds
Fix usage statistics not matching between RivonClaw and gateway providers
Fix dev-only files being included in extensions package

修复打包后 OAuth 登录失败的问题
修复用量统计与实际不一致的问题
修复打包时包含了多余开发文件的问题

en: Fix Windows console UTF-8 encoding for non-ASCII filenames in exec
Bundle volcengine-stt-cli into packaged app
zh: 修复 Windows 控制台中文文件名乱码问题
修复火山引擎语音识别组件未打包的问题

en: Split mobile install and pairing into two-step flow for Safari PWA compatibility
zh: 手机端安装和配对拆分为两步流程，兼容 Safari PWA

en: Add event bridge plugin for extensible event handling
Upgrade OpenClaw engine to v2026.3.7
Fix mobile chat media handling and reaction support
Fix QR code pairing: add expiry countdown, refresh, and shorter TTL
Fix auto-repair of invalid gateway config on startup
Fix dev warnings for startup-timer, memory-core plugin, and telegram groupPolicy
Add vendor bundle verification for build integrity
Add image input support for local models and custom providers
zh: 本地模型和自定义模型新增图片输入支持
新增事件桥接插件，支持可扩展事件处理
升级 OpenClaw 引擎至 v2026.3.7
修复手机聊天媒体处理和表情回应功能

修复启动时自动修复无效网关配置
修复开发模式下启动计时器、内存插件、Telegram 群组策略警告
新增打包完整性验证

en: Fix mobile chat streaming — messages now arrive in real-time
Fix mobile session reset with proper transcript archiving
Fix message delivery recovery for tool-sent messages
Mac: fall back to browser download while Apple developer cert is pending
Fix packaged builds: inline relay constants in mobile-chat-channel
Add component-level telemetry tracking across all panel pages
Add diagnostic logs for silent Windows gateway crashes
Improve mobile peer routing and channel allowlist UI

修复手机会话重置，正确归档聊天记录

面板各页面新增组件级遥测追踪

优化手机端对等路由和频道允许列表界面

en: Fix mobile chat plugin failing to load in packaged builds (missing ws dependency)
zh: 修复打包后手机聊天插件无法加载的问题

en: Add OpenAI Codex as OAuth provider
Add thinking level selector to chat page

zh: 支持开机自启动设置
更智能的自动更新，安装过程中防止重复启动
新增扩展：服务商管理工具和 RivonClaw 工具集
修复聊天气泡截断和发送后自动滚动问题
升级 OpenClaw 引擎至 v2026.2.23

en: Chat bubbles now render Markdown with syntax highlighting and copy button
Improved model validation with dynamic provider resolution
zh: 聊天气泡支持 Markdown 渲染，含语法高亮和复制按钮
改进模型验证，支持动态服务商解析

en: Added nonce challenge-response to gateway connect handshake for improved security
Added "Get API key" link in subscription tab for easier onboarding
Split E2E smoke tests into per-page test files for better maintainability
zh: 网关连接握手新增 nonce 挑战-响应机制，提升安全性
订阅标签页新增「获取 API Key」链接，方便用户快速获取
E2E 测试拆分为按页面组织的独立文件，提升可维护性

en: Added inline model switcher in chat status bar
Added new providers: NVIDIA, Qwen Coding, ModelScope
Refactored main process into 6 smaller modules for better maintainability
Merged browser settings into agent section with improved card spacing
Fixed macOS 20-50s stalls by replacing pkill with killall
Fixed CDP browser wrapper to reuse directory across restarts, preserving login state
Upgraded vendored OpenClaw to v2026.2.22
zh: 新增聊天状态栏内联模型切换器
新增供应商：NVIDIA、Qwen Coding、ModelScope
主进程重构为 6 个独立模块，提升可维护性
浏览器设置合并到 Agent 区域，优化卡片间距
修复 macOS 下 pkill 导致的 20-50 秒卡顿
修复 CDP 浏览器包装目录在重启后丢失登录状态的问题
升级内置 OpenClaw 至 v2026.2.22

en: Added CDP mode to connect agent to user's own Chrome browser
Added file path attachment button for chat messages
Fixed streaming text duplication when tool calls arrive during chat
Reverted vendored AMR decoder in favor of ffmpeg-based conversion
Fixed 30s stall detection that wrongly aborted long agent runs
Fixed provider links placement and removed inline styles on STT page
Fixed chat attachments to restrict to images only
Fixed subscription dropdown count assertion for new providers
zh: 新增 CDP 模式，可连接用户自己的 Chrome 浏览器
新增聊天消息文件路径附件按钮
修复聊天中 tool call 触发时流式文本重复显示的问题
移除内置 AMR 解码器，恢复使用 ffmpeg 转换
修复 30 秒超时检测误中断长时间运行的 agent 任务
修复 LLM 服务商链接位置，清理语音转文字页面样式
修复聊天附件限制为仅图片
修复新增服务商后订阅下拉菜单计数断言

en: Added customer service app module for intelligent customer support
Added real-time chat experience with run tracking and stop/reset controls
Added Doubao Seed 2.0 models (Pro-128k and Lite-128k) to Volcengine provider
Reorganized panel navigation with Apps section for modular features
Added i18n support for WeCom configuration error messages
Fixed update banner showing for newer client versions than server
Fixed model catalog synchronization to use extraModels as authoritative source
zh: 新增智能客服应用模块，支持客服场景智能回复
新增实时聊天体验，支持运行追踪和停止/重置控制
新增豆包 Seed 2.0 模型（Pro-128k 和 Lite-128k）
重新组织面板导航，新增应用分区用于模块化功能
为企业微信配置错误信息添加国际化支持
修复客户端版本比服务器更新时仍显示更新横幅的问题
修复模型目录同步使用 extraModels 作为权威源的问题

en: Fixed Windows installer blocking dialogs during upgrade
Fixed installer retry loop when old uninstall registry entries exist
Fixed update API to always return current version
Added staging environment support for update testing
zh: 修复 Windows 安装程序升级时弹出阻塞对话框
修复安装程序因旧注册表项导致的重试循环
修复更新 API 未返回当前版本号的问题
新增 Staging 环境支持，用于更新流程测试

en: Added Linux support (AppImage + deb packages)
Migrated to electron-updater for blockmap differential downloads
Chat: support all file types in uploads and add message timestamps
Fixed device ID generation on Linux using /etc/machine-id
Fixed stale gateway lock file cleanup on startup
Fixed tools.exec config schema path and enabled full access mode
Fixed gateway scope registration for agent exec on host
Fixed local model health checks bypassing Chromium proxy
Fixed E2E test reliability on macOS (count only visible key cards after deletion)
Improved pnpm symlink preservation during development
zh: 新增 Linux 支持（AppImage + deb 安装包）
迁移到 electron-updater，支持增量更新
聊天：支持所有文件类型上传，新增消息时间戳
修复 Linux 设备 ID 生成，使用 /etc/machine-id
修复启动时 gateway 锁文件清理
修复 tools.exec 配置路径，启用完全访问模式
修复 gateway scope 注册，支持主机上 agent 执行
修复本地模型健康检查绕过 Chromium 代理
修复 macOS E2E 测试稳定性（删除后仅计算可见卡片）
改进开发时 pnpm 符号链接保留机制

en: Fixed local model auto-select so save button is enabled immediately
Fixed skills cache not refreshing after install/delete
Fixed Unknown model error from vendor catalog normalization
Fixed unrecognized config keys being rejected on write
Improved E2E test reliability with shorter timeouts and automatic retry
Refactored release pipeline: parallel CI build + local testing
zh: 修复本地模型自动选择，保存按钮立即可用
修复 skill 安装/删除后缓存未刷新
修复 vendor 模型目录规范化导致的「未知模型」错误
修复写入配置时不识别的顶层字段被拒绝
提升 E2E 测试稳定性：缩短超时时间并自动重试
重构发布流程：CI 构建与本地测试并行执行

en: Added local LLM support (Ollama)
Fixed WeChat message reply not working
Fixed Skill Market install failing on Windows due to missing unzip command
Fixed Windows update: kill gateway before install, show progress dialog
Fixed Google OAuth routing through correct Gemini CLI provider
Fixed Windows gateway hang from inherited NODE_COMPILE_CACHE
Fixed Gemini OAuth: require projectId and surface discovery errors
Fixed OAuth error messages now show user-friendly details
Fixed portable exe filename containing spaces that broke release scripts
zh: 新增本地 LLM 支持（Ollama）
修复微信无法回复的问题
修复 Windows 系统 Skill Market 因缺少 unzip 命令无法安装 skill
修复 Windows 更新：安装前关闭 gateway，更新过程中显示进度对话框
修复 Google OAuth 路由到正确的 Gemini CLI provider
修复 Windows gateway 因继承 NODE_COMPILE_CACHE 导致卡死
修复 Gemini OAuth：要求 projectId 并正确显示项目发现错误
修复 OAuth 错误信息现在显示用户友好的详细说明
修复 portable exe 文件名含空格导致发布脚本出错

en: Fixed Kimi Coding 404 error, subscription badge display, and activate persistence
zh: 修复 Kimi Coding 404 错误、订阅标识显示和激活持久化问题

en: Fixed Gemini OAuth failure on IPv6 systems with manual fallback UI
Fixed app unable to quit (gateway restart loop on shutdown)
Faster app startup: skip slow cleanup when gateway port is free
Fixed gateway RPC connection race condition
Fixed missing scope error after vendor upgrade with per-provider API format support
Model dropdown now opens upward when near page bottom
Added device identity authentication for gateway RPC
Fixed port conflicts between E2E test runs
zh: 修复 IPv6 系统上 Gemini OAuth 失败问题，新增手动授权备选界面
修复程序无法正常退出的问题（关闭时 gateway 重启死循环）
更快启动速度：gateway 端口空闲时跳过耗时清理
修复 gateway RPC 连接竞态条件
修复 vendor 升级后的 scope 缺失错误，支持按模型商配置 API 格式
模型下拉菜单在页面底部时自动向上展开
新增设备身份认证用于 gateway RPC 通信
修复 E2E 测试之间的端口冲突问题

en: Smarter timeout detection: replaced fixed timeout with stall detection heartbeat for chat responses
Fixed gateway startup race condition on Windows that caused flaky test failures
Added DevTools shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+I / Cmd+Option+I) in production builds
Fixed update checker crash (currentState temporal dead zone error)
Auto-provision Gemini project for Pro subscribers during OAuth
zh: 更智能的超时检测：聊天响应从固定超时改为停滞检测心跳机制
修复 Windows 上 gateway 启动竞态条件导致的测试偶发失败
生产构建中新增 DevTools 快捷键（Ctrl+Shift+I / Cmd+Option+I）
修复更新检查器崩溃（currentState 暂时性死区错误）
Gemini Pro 订阅用户 OAuth 时自动配置项目

en: Chat now shows real-time agent status (processing, using tools, generating)
Scroll-to-bottom button when chat history is long
Inline tool call records in chat history
Chat settings: toggle agent events display and tool event preservation
Improved DM scope hint text for clarity
Refactored plugin architecture: split openclaw-plugin into policy package + extension shell
Added privacy notice to WeChat Customer Service binding modal
Fixed sharp native binaries missing in packaged app
zh: 聊天现在实时显示代理状态（处理中、使用工具、生成回复）
聊天记录过长时显示回到底部按钮
聊天记录中内联显示工具调用记录
新增聊天设置：可开关代理状态显示和工具记录保留
优化私聊隔离设置的说明文案
重构插件架构：将 openclaw-plugin 拆分为 policy 包和扩展外壳
微信客服绑定弹窗新增隐私声明
修复打包后 sharp 原生二进制文件缺失问题

en: Skills page: browse, search, and install skills from ClawHub
Added MiniMax (Chinese) as a built-in provider
Subscription plans now nest under parent providers for cleaner UI
Fixed dev startup race condition with proxy-router
Fixed native module rebuild conflicts in dev mode
zh: 技能页面：浏览、搜索和安装 ClawHub 技能
新增 MiniMax（国产）内置服务商
订阅计划归入父级服务商，界面更清晰
修复开发模式下 proxy-router 启动竞争条件
修复开发模式下原生模块重编译冲突

en: Per-key usage tracking with pricing breakdown and inline label editing
Auth type badge on provider keys
Fixed Select dropdown clipping in forms
Fixed Windows installer artifact naming
zh: 按密钥用量追踪，支持费用明细和内联标签编辑
服务商密钥显示认证类型标识
修复表单中下拉菜单被裁剪的问题
修复 Windows 安装包文件命名

en: Upgraded Electron 35 → 40 and better-sqlite3 11 → 12
Added E2E testing for both dev and packaged builds (Playwright)
New local CI/CD pipeline: build + test + release from local machines
Improved native module handling for dual Node.js/Electron environments
Lowered Node.js requirement from v25 to v24
zh: Electron 35 → 40、better-sqlite3 11 → 12 升级
新增端到端测试：覆盖开发版和打包后的应用（Playwright）
全新本地 CI/CD 流程：本地构建 + 测试 + 发布
改进原生模块处理，支持 Node.js/Electron 双环境
Node.js 最低版本要求从 v25 降至 v24

en: Robust update ready state, Windows compatibility, and banner UI cleanup
zh: 更新就绪状态更可靠、Windows 兼容性改进、更新横幅 UI 优化

en: Fixed stale extensionsDir paths across installs and Windows compatibility
zh: 修复跨安装的扩展目录路径残留和 Windows 兼容性问题

en: Unified extension loading via single extensionsDir path
Fixed search-browser-fallback plugin path in packaged app
zh: 统一扩展加载路径（单一 extensionsDir）
修复打包后搜索浏览器回退插件路径问题

en: Compress chat images client-side to fit WebSocket 512KB frame limit
Delay update check to avoid startup race condition
zh: 客户端压缩聊天图片以适应 WebSocket 512KB 帧限制
延迟更新检查以避免启动时竞态条件

en: WeCom rebind warning and channel lifecycle events
Fixed updater: fire-and-forget download, un-dismiss banner on active download
Moved search-browser-fallback plugin to extensions/
TypeScript strict-mode and React 19 compatibility fixes
Dependency updates (undici, @types/ws)
zh: 企业微信重新绑定警告和频道生命周期事件
修复更新器：后台下载、下载中重新显示更新横幅
搜索浏览器回退插件移至 extensions/
TypeScript 严格模式和 React 19 兼容性修复
依赖更新（undici、@types/ws）

en: Fixed Windows auto-update failing due to file locks during installation
zh: 修复 Windows 自动更新因文件锁导致安装失败的问题

en: WeCom: image message support (send and receive)
Refactored provider setup with unified configuration form
Added subscription pricing table for providers
Security: disabled open DM policy option
zh: 企业微信：支持图片消息收发
重构服务商设置，统一配置表单
新增服务商订阅定价表
安全：禁用开放 DM 策略选项

en: In-app auto-update: download, verify, and install updates without leaving the app
Web search now falls back to browser when API is unavailable
zh: 应用内自动更新：无需离开应用即可下载、验证并安装更新
网页搜索在 API 不可用时自动回退到浏览器搜索

en: Fix proxy routing for API key validation
Improve Windows compatibility
Polish onboarding OAuth UI flow
Telemetry: add device ID tracking and fix engagement funnel
zh: 修复 API Key 验证的代理路由问题
改进 Windows 兼容性
优化引导页 OAuth 登录流程
遥测：添加设备 ID 追踪并修复用户活跃漏斗

en: Show agent name in sidebar header
Strip internal metadata from chat messages
Updated documentation with WeCom relay and Gemini OAuth details
zh: 侧边栏显示 Agent 名称
聊天消息中去除内部元数据
更新文档：企业微信 Relay 和 Gemini OAuth 说明

en: WeCom Customer Service integration with scene-based auto-binding
Voice message transcription via speech-to-text
ARM64 signing and system proxy support for proxy router
Declare image input support for vision-capable extra models
Mask API key inputs with password fields for security
UI polish for WeCom binding flow and channel registration
zh: 企业微信客服集成，支持场景式自动绑定
语音消息自动转文字
ARM64 签名和代理路由器系统代理支持
为支持视觉的扩展模型声明图片输入能力
API Key 输入框改为密码字段，提升安全性
企业微信绑定流程和频道注册 UI 优化

en: Fix model dropdown clipping and simplify provider setup links
Resolve npm absolute path before launching gateway
Default device management policy to pairing mode when not configured
zh: 修复模型下拉菜单裁剪问题并简化服务商设置链接
启动网关前解析 npm 绝对路径
未配置时默认设备管理策略为配对模式

en: Fix gateway process cleanup on quit (kill entire process tree)
Bypass proxy for channel API calls
Enrich PATH for npm discovery in packaged app
Replace native dialogs with in-app confirm dialogs
Fix channel account add/edit/delete flow
Auto-enable channel plugins on account creation
Fix dropdown clipping in section cards
zh: 修复退出时网关进程清理（终止整个进程树）
频道 API 调用绕过代理
打包应用中增强 PATH 以发现 npm
原生对话框替换为应用内确认对话框
修复频道账户增删改流程
创建频道账户时自动启用插件
修复下拉菜单被卡片容器裁剪问题

en: Add GLM-5 and GLM-5-Code model support with pricing
zh: 新增 GLM-5 和 GLM-5-Code 模型支持及定价

en: Dark/light theme system with premium UI polish
UI improvements: channels table, sidebar overflow, onboarding flow
Rules page: better textarea height, text truncation tooltip, edit alignment
Windows: remove default menu bar, hide agent name on empty chat
zh: 深色/浅色主题系统，高级 UI 打磨
UI 改进：频道列表、侧边栏滚动、引导流程优化
规则页面：文本框高度、截断提示、编辑对齐修复
Windows：移除默认菜单栏，空聊天隐藏代理名称

en: Gemini OAuth: sign in with Google to use Gemini models (no API key needed)
Chat: improved error handling with clear error messages
Providers page: UI improvements and provider key management
zh: Gemini OAuth：使用 Google 账号登录即可使用 Gemini 模型（无需 API Key）
聊天：改进错误处理，显示清晰的错误信息
服务商页面：UI 改进和密钥管理优化

en: Telemetry: client-side tracking with consent dialog and 21-event taxonomy
Locale-based endpoint routing (auto-select CN/US telemetry server)
Dev telemetry toggle for testing
Generate CN update manifest in release script
Fix: chat timeout only applies before first streaming delta
Cleanup: remove leftover wildcard permission code
zh: 遥测：客户端埋点，含用户同意弹窗和 21 种事件分类
按语言环境自动路由遥测端点（中国/美国服务器）
开发模式遥测开关
发布脚本新增生成中国区更新清单
修复：聊天超时仅在首次流式响应前生效
清理：移除多余的通配符权限代码

en: macOS: clicking the dock icon now restores the window when hidden
Windows/Linux: clicking the tray icon toggles window visibility
zh: macOS：点击 Dock 图标可恢复已隐藏的窗口
Windows/Linux：点击托盘图标可切换窗口显示/隐藏

en: Fixed Mac dock icon: prevent child processes from showing extra dock icons
Minor UI polish for What's New dialog
zh: 修复 Mac Dock 图标问题：阻止子进程显示多余的 Dock 图标
「新功能」弹窗 UI 微调

en: Chat page: collapsible example prompts to help new users get started
File permissions: full access mode toggle for simplified setup
Improved file path validation with better glob and home-dir support
zh: 聊天页面：可折叠的示例提示，帮助新用户快速上手
文件权限：新增完全访问模式开关，简化权限配置
优化文件路径验证，改进通配符和主目录路径支持

en: Volcengine STT voice pipeline integration
Region-aware update manifest for CDN routing
Pricing table: CNY support, chat images, sidebar logo & version display
"What's New" changelog modal after version updates
Chat emoji picker
API and telemetry endpoints migrated to dedicated subdomains
Fixed workspace redirect, browser config, permission grants, and provider URLs
zh: 火山引擎 STT 语音识别接入
更新检查支持按地区选择 CDN 节点
价格表增强：人民币显示、聊天图片、侧边栏 Logo 和版本号
版本更新后弹出「新功能」更新日志
聊天输入框添加表情选择器
API 和遥测端点迁移到专用子域名
修复工作区重定向、浏览器配置、权限授予和服务商链接等问题

en: Panel now opens in built-in window (no more external browser)
Minimize to tray when closing the window
Resizable sidebar with drag handle
Reduced redundant API requests with smart caching
Pricing table with scrollable layout
zh: 面板改为内置窗口打开（不再使用外部浏览器）
关闭窗口时最小化到托盘
侧边栏支持拖拽调整宽度
智能缓存减少重复 API 请求
价格表支持滚动显示
